tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Funky Town - Lipps, Inc

[Intro]
|  [ch]C[/ch]  |  %  |  %  |

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Gotta make move to a time that's right for me.[/tab]
Time to keep me moving keep me groovin with some energy.
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Well now talk about it, talk about it, talk about it, talk about it.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Talk about, talk about, talk about movin'.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Gotta move on, gotta move on, gotta move on.[/tab]
